metadata.title: Bike Mobility Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Bike Mobility domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Employer Policy Program
assets.description: Configures employer-level mobility programs including subsidy logic, plan design, market variations, approval rules, and policy governance.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Employer Policy & Program.

interfaces.name: employer-policy-program api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Employer Policy Program.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Quote Subsidy Savings Configurator
assets.description: Calculates rider and employer cost scenarios, subsidy rules, and savings projections before enrollment or policy changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator.

interfaces.name: quote-subsidy-savings-configurator api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Quote Subsidy Savings Configurator.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Eligibility Payroll Hris Sync
assets.description: Synchronizes employee eligibility, payroll deductions, employment events, and employer master data with HR and payroll systems.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync.

interfaces.name: eligibility-payroll-hris-sync api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Eligibility Payroll Hris Sync.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Bike Catalog Recommendation
assets.description: Presents bike, accessory, and package choices with recommendation logic based on commute profile, employer policy, and local availability.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Bike Catalog & Recommendation.

interfaces.name: bike-catalog-recommendation api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Bike Catalog Recommendation.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Order Orchestration Checkout
assets.description: Runs the end-to-end ordering flow including approvals, signatures, reservations, order routing, and state transitions.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Order Orchestration & Checkout.

interfaces.name: order-orchestration-checkout api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Order Orchestration Checkout.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Stock Availability Handover Planning
assets.description: Tracks inventory, reservations, appointment capacity, and fulfillment readiness across dealers and service partners.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Stock, Availability & Handover Planning.

interfaces.name: stock-availability-handover-planning api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Stock Availability Handover Planning.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Insurance Claims Administration
assets.description: Manages policy application, claim intake, evidence collection, approvals, reimbursement, and replacement workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Insurance & Claims Administration.

interfaces.name: insurance-claims-administration api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Insurance Claims Administration.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Remarketing Refurbishment Resale
assets.description: Captures residual value through bike return, refurbish, resale, and next-life inventory flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Remarketing, Refurbishment & Resale.

interfaces.name: remarketing-refurbishment-resale api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Remarketing Refurbishment Resale.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
